bio: Operating straight out of Madison, Wisconsin, Tyrox is an elite multi-platinum record producer. Pioneering precision-engineered acoustic trap rhythms and aggressive dark synth lines, this portal is the definitive vault. Merging high-fidelity sub-bass architecture directly with uncompressed master stems, Tyrox delivers clinical industry-standard track assets for label-ready artists.
